title: 2023 Singapore reported median total compensation by current-compensation negotiation response
summary: Aggregate results from Design Pay Asia 2022-23 survey data, filtered exactly to Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD (n=223). Negotiation responses were Yes n=121 at S$84,500; No n=88 at S$84,150; and Not applicable n=11 at S$85,801. Three blank responses are omitted. These are respondent medians, not population estimates.
methodology: The authoritative worksheet was filtered using exact matches Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD, leaving n=223. One Singapore response reported in USD was excluded and no currency conversion was applied. Three blank negotiation responses were omitted rather than rendered or inferred. Values are self-reported total compensation medians, and no respondent-level data is exposed.
